headline: Verizon shuts down longtime customer support option after layoffs
summary: Verizon is discontinuing a customer support option it has offered for 18 years, a move that comes after recently announcing a series of layoffs. The carrier has undergone a transformation under new CEO Dan Schulman in recent months as it works to slow customer losses in its wireless business. This ...

headline: T-Mobile Stock Falls. What’s Overshadowing Earnings Beat.
summary: T-Mobile US  stock was sliding on Thursday after the wireless carrier reported softer-than-expected second-quarter revenue, overshadowing an earnings beat.  T-Mobile reported adjusted earnings of $2.99, as revenue climbed 7.9% from a year ago to $22.8 billion.  T-Mobile also said it now expects full-year adjusted free cash flow of between $18.4 billion and $18.8 billion, up from prior guidance of $18.1 billion to $18.7 billion.
